Hero.description: Arisan SECurity (A-SEC) is a platform for discussing Information Technology, especially in the field of Information Technology Security. We are openly welcoming all groups and elements of society to not only collaborate but also elaborate.

Progress.cyberCases: Total cyber security cases we've helped resolve.

Shortcut.subtitle: Shortcuts
Shortcut.title: Information You Might Need
Shortcut.sawalaMangkusDesc: Help build healthy and positive Information Technology discussions through our online Telegram group, available for the public.
Shortcut.lintasTaksaDesc: Presenting brief, up-to-date perspectives from expert practitioners and Information Technology enthusiasts, particularly in the field of Cybersecurity.
Shortcut.acastDesc: A non-streaming digital audio that covers everything about Information Technology. Listen to comprehensive IT world updates anytime, anywhere!

Blog.title: Written Works From Contributors
Blog.ctaQuestion: Want to become a contributor to our blog?

Activity.title: Recent Activities
Activity.ctfDesc1: Dr.WEB is back looking for the best talent in cybersecurity! 🛡
Activity.ctfDesc2: Join the Capture The Flag (CTF) competition from December 2 – 15, 2024, and prove your skills in reverse engineering & file analysis. 💻
Activity.ctfChallenge: Complete 16 challenges to capture the "flag" and collect the most points. The fastest players will earn bonus points!
Activity.ctfPrize1: 🎁 Dr.WEB Security Space license (1 year) for all participants
Activity.ctfPrize2: 🎁 Special prizes for the top 20 players

Cta.title: Writing Is the Window to Knowledge, From All Fields of Knowledge
Cta.question: Want to get involved as a contributor?
Cta.desc1: We implement a Crowdsourcing model, which means anyone can contribute to this platform. From the community, for the community; from you, for you. Every piece of writing you submit will go through a proofreading process by our editors.
Cta.desc2: Once your writing meets the publishing criteria, you will earn points that are useful for leading the Scholar Champions leaderboard, like a Hall of Fame.

Projects.subtitle: Projects
Projects.title: Spotlight on Our Latest Projects for the Public
Projects.ideaDesc: If you have a creative idea related to the IT world, don't hesitate to send your idea through the "Contact" page.

Seo.defaultTitle: Arisan Security - Indonesian IT Security Community

About.whoDesc1: We are a non-profit community oriented toward the civilization of Information Technology, especially in the field of Information Technology Security.
About.whoDesc2: We carry out various activities to support our members in contributing to the Information Technology ecosystem, particularly in Indonesia's cybersecurity sector, on a sustainable basis.
About.napakDesc1: Arisan SECurity {A-SEC} is a platform for discussing Information Technology, especially in the field of Information Technology Security. We are open to all layers of society to not only collaborate but also elaborate.
About.napakDesc2: Information Technology Security is the most valuable asset for internet users (Digital World) in welcoming the Industry 5.0 era, which is extremely lacking in privacy. Therefore, the "Security Awareness" mindset must be socialized and educated to the general public.
About.napakDesc3: A-SEC was born in the city of Salatiga, a strategic city known as "Mini Indonesia". This is because many people from all across Indonesia come to this student city to pursue education, build careers, and more.
About.napakDesc4: Seeing this potential, we are very optimistic and believe that A-SEC can spread the "Security Awareness" mindset throughout Indonesia, especially in 3T regions (Underdeveloped, Frontier, and Outermost) through our members who have joined the A-SEC volunteer project and are growing through our mentorship system.
About.bertumbuhDesc: Learning together in developing the knowledge of each community member to become more mature in comprehensive thinking and competent individuals in IT, especially IT Security.
About.bergerakDesc: Encouraging creativity and implementation among community members from the exchange of digital information in IT, especially IT Security, so that concrete evidence of applied theory is clearly visible.
About.berdampakDesc: Creating positive impact from every implementation and movement carried out, ensuring it is always beneficial for fellow community members, IT enthusiasts, and even the general public.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.description: We are open and supportive of all parties who wish to collaborate with us in building a better human civilization, especially in the world of Information Technology & Cybersecurity.
